customlist.name: Companion Prompt Edition
customlist.aidescription: Crafted ERP edition that a companion prompt targets. Used to filter prompts by edition: Distillery, Winery, Brewery, or Cross-Edition (applies to all editions). Stored on the prompt extension record (customrecord_dz_prompt_meta).

customvalue.aidescription: Prompt targets Distillery edition accounts. Uses distillery-specific tools and fields (proof gallons, barrel aging, angel's share, TTB compliance).
Prompt targets Winery edition accounts. Uses winery-specific tools and fields (vintage, varietal, appellation, batch genealogy, wine compliance).
Prompt targets Brewery edition accounts. Uses brewery-specific tools and fields (batch brewing, recipe management, keg tracking, TTB beer reporting).
Prompt applies to all Crafted ERP editions. Uses only cross-edition tools and fields (inventory, cost, supply chain) with no edition-specific logic.
